title: Contact Card v1 (shared)
description: One JSON per person, stored centrally in _contacts/. Project-cards and meeting-cards reference a contact by id rather than copying contact details, so a change of role or departure happens in exactly one place. Shared with the meeting-coach companion.

id.description: Format: CONTACT-{org_code}-{name-slug}. Slug = lowercase, dashes, no diacritics. Examples: CONTACT-ACME-mark-thompson, CONTACT-INTERNAL-sarah-chen.

code.description: Org code, e.g. a customer code (ACME), a vendor code (STOWLINE), or a generic bucket (INTERNAL, THIRDPARTY).

title.description: Formal job title if different from role.

active.description: true = still an active contact; false = departed / no longer relevant.

departed_at.description: Departure date; only relevant when active=false. Cards are never deleted — a departed contact stays referencable from historical cards.

involved_in.description: Project-card ids this person is/was involved in.
